description: Governed filesystem mutation and export creation must route through BTS-wrapped executors that run the Stage6B pre-action gate, emit BTS tool-pipeline records, create T1 receipts, and record implementation_reality before any file-change or export claim is accepted.
requirements: filesystem writes performed as governed OS execution must use bts_wrapped_filesystem_write or a wrapper with equivalent receipts
export ZIP creation performed as governed OS execution must use bts_wrapped_export_zip or a wrapper with equivalent receipts
every wrapper action must produce a PolicyDecision_v1 receipt before execution
every wrapper action must produce a BTS turn record with INTENT, EVALUATION, SELECTION, EXECUTION, RESULT, and COMMIT events
every wrapper action must produce implementation_reality with PASS before success is claimed
full export actions require a scoped approval_token before execution
